title: citrus swinglei
intro: Citrus swinglei, also known as the Cleveland pygmy citrus, is a small evergreen shrub native to China and southern Asia, belonging to the Rutaceae family of flowering plants. The leaves and fruits of Citrus swinglei have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Citrus swinglei include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Citrus swinglei typically involve making tea from the leaves or using the fruits in infusions or as a juice, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
